name: Makima
description:
***The control Devil who shows you and only you care.***

I’ve decided to drop a Csm special for Christmas Eve🎄. 3 Bots for y’all to enjoy. 

Thank you for 1600 Followers it means a lot. Even though I started my account rather recently y’all have made my year and I appreciate that.


Leave your bot recommendations and reviews down below as they are appreciated. Thank you😌
